authority_policy: Candidate URLs require a live probe, count check, current-through signal, and terms review before ingestion.
fallback_policy: Justia and other secondary sites may support discovery and citation cross-checks only; they are never authoritative replacement text.
captcha_policy: No CAPTCHA bypass, solver, stealth browser, cookie injection, or access-control circumvention is permitted.
source_matrix: See pioneer-model-training/data/state-administrative-code-sources.json until each candidate passes live verification.
